Event: The New Fairy Adventure
Event Date: 01/03/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: P11


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Sharpshooter Thumbelina Pistols

The unit's attacks have a 36% chance of ignoring 30% of the target's armor.
Every second, the pistol owner fires an additional shot at their attack target. The shot deals 125% damage. Shots are fired even if the owner of the pistols is under movement restriction effects.
When attacking, the unit has a 40% chance to deal 96000 physical damage to the target of the attack and all enemies in a small radius around it. All affected enemies catch fire and take 80000 magic damage for 3 sec, and their healing rate is reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌚
